description: Create a nightly release GitHub Actions workflow that runs daily and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have separate jobs for building on Linux, Windows, and macOS, and a final job to update the nightly release with the build artifacts. Each build job should check out the code, build the project, and upload the artifact. The final job should delete the existing nightly tag, clean previous binaries, download the build artifacts, create a release zip, generate release notes, and update the nightly GitHub release.
